title: OpenDecree Config Format (v0.1.0)
description: Tenant-side import format for OpenDecree config values. A decree.config.yaml file declares the values to apply against a previously imported schema; the server enforces type compatibility and cross-field rules at write time.

spec_version.description: Decree config-format spec version. Must be "v1".

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this meta-schema. HTTPS URL.

description.description: Human-readable description of the config (e.g. release notes).

version.description: Informational config version. The server assigns the next version on import; this field is round-tripped through ImportConfig / ExportConfig for documentation purposes.

values.description: Map of field path to value entry. Field paths must reference real fields in the bound schema; the server enforces this at import. The value's wire shape depends on the schema's field type (integer/number/string/bool/time/duration/url/json) — meta-schema does not type-check the value itself.

fieldPath.description: Field path. ASCII letter/underscore start; alphanumeric, underscore, dot, hyphen.

configValue.description: One value entry. The actual value's type is checked server-side against the schema.

value.description: The value to apply. Type must match the bound schema's field type — checked server-side. Null indicates the field is being cleared.

description.description: Human-readable description of this specific value.
